hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
response = json.dumps(data.get('tool_response', ''))
if re.search(r'unauthorized|401|token.expired|invalid.token|not.authenticated|authentication.required', response, re.IGNORECASE):
    print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': 'Notion MCP auth error detected. Your session may have expired — re-authenticate via /mcp.'}))
" 2>/dev/null || true
